---
title: Unequal Interbranch Representation
subtitle: How Members of Congress work with the bureaucracy and why some do much more than others
runningtitle: Unequal Interbranch Representation
runningauthor: Judge-Lord, Powell, & Snyder
author:
  - name: Devin Judge-Lord
    affiliations:
      - name: University of Michigan
    #department: Ford School of Public Policy
    email: "judgelor@umich.edu"
    attributes:
      corresponding: true
  - name: Eleanor Neff Powell
    affiliations:
      - name: University of Wisconsin-Madison
    #department: Department of Political Science
  - name: Rochelle Snycer 
    affiliations:
      - name: Coe College
    #department: Department of Political Science
date: today

abstract: "`r readLines('google_drive/abstract.md')`"
thanks: |
  We welcome any comments: <judgelor@umich.edu>. 
  `r readLines('google_drive/acknowledgements.md')`
# doi: 
# dataverse: ""
format: pdf
toc: true
toc-depth: 1
linestretch: 1.5
number-sections: true
number-depth: 2
indent: true
cap-location: top
bibliography: "assets/cor.bib" # from cor.bib google doc
journal:
  blinded: false
# wordcount: 9938
execute:
 echo: false
 cache: false
 message: false
 warning: false
---

```{r knit-options}
# to update chapter content, you need to provide an email and authorize google drive access
email = "devin.jl@gmail.com"
update = T

# get chapters from google drive and render the book
if(update){source("code/get_chapters.R")} 

# inline numbers round to 2, comma at thousands
knitr::knit_hooks$set(inline = function(x) {
  if (is.na(as.numeric(x))) {
    return (x)
    } else
        return (as.numeric(x) |> 
                 round(2) |>
                 format(big.mark=",") 
        )
})

library(scales)
library(here)
```

\clearpage 

{{< include "google_drive/Chapter 1 - Intro.md" >}}

{{< include "google_drive/Chapter 2 - Theories of Interbranch Representation.md" >}}

{{< include "google_drive/Chapter 3 - Measuring (Invisible) Interbranch Representation.md" >}}

{{< include "google_drive/Chapter 4 - Unequal Interbranch Representation.md" >}}

{{< include "google_drive/Chapter 10 - Conclusion.md" >}}

{{< include "references.qmd" >}}

\setcounter{section}{0}
\renewcommand{\thesection}{\Alph{section}}

\setcounter{table}{0}
\renewcommand{\thetable}{A\arabic{table}}

\setcounter{figure}{0}
\renewcommand{\thefigure}{A\arabic{figure}}

{{< include "google_drive/Appendix.md" >}}
